name: United States v. Tsarnaev
question: Did the U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit err in vacating the death sentence for the district court’s failure to ask prospective jurors for a specific accounting of the pretrial media coverage they had seen, heard, or read, and for its exclusion of evidence at the sentencing phase of trial that Tsarnaev’s brother had been involved in different crimes two years before the bombing?
description: A case in which the Court will decide whether to reinstate the death penalty for Boston Marathon bomber Dzhokhar Tsarnaev.
